Client Reviews

5.0/5 average rating from 7+ happy clients

What Our Clients Say

Real feedback from homeowners and businesses who trust Apex Roofing & Restoration to get the job done right.

“After the April hailstorm left my Round Rock home with dozens of damaged shingles, Apex had a crew out within hours to tarp the worst spots. Their detailed documentation helped State Farm approve a full replacement without hassle. The new impact-resistant shingles look great and give me peace of mind.”

James T. Storm Damage Repair
Mar 15, 2025

“We chose Apex for our Barton Hills bungalow's metal roof after seeing their work on a neighbor's historic home. They perfectly matched the standing seam profile to maintain our 1940s aesthetic while adding modern weather protection. Even during heavy rains, the roof is whisper quiet.”

Maria G. Metal Roofing
Feb 28, 2025

“Our Pflugerville home's original roof was failing after just 12 years—turns out the builder used cheap materials. Apex explained all our options clearly and installed a premium system that should last decades. They even coordinated with our HOA to ensure color compliance.”

David & Sarah L. Roof Replacement
Jan 10, 2025

“As property manager for a Georgetown retail center, I appreciate Apex's proactive approach. Their semi-annual inspections caught minor flashing issues before they became leaks. When we needed a section replaced after a storm, they worked nights to avoid disrupting tenants.”

Robert K. Commercial Roofing
Dec 5, 2024

“Our Cedar Park home's original gutters couldn't handle Austin's downpours. Apex designed a custom 6" system with extra downspouts that solved our foundation drainage issues. Two years later, not a single overflow—even during the Memorial Day floods.”

Lisa M. Gutter Installation
Nov 18, 2024

“The free inspection revealed ventilation problems in our Mueller attic that were cooking our shingles from underneath. Apex's affordable fix added years to our roof's life. Their thermal imaging showed exactly where heat was trapped—super insightful!”

Carlos R. Roof Inspection
Oct 22, 2024

“When wind tore shingles off our East Austin bungalow, Apex matched the vintage-style architectural shingles perfectly. The repair blends seamlessly—you'd never know it wasn't original. Their crew even repaired our historic wood soffit at no extra charge.”

Emily S. Shingle Repair
Sep 30, 2024
Apex Roofing & Restoration

Trusted roofing serving Austin, TX and the surrounding areas. Quality work, honest pricing, guaranteed satisfaction.
